name: The Sword Players - SFoTH Themed Nullscape Players
description:
You encounter a group of players themed around a few of the SFoTH swords, some but not all of them

Fun fact: These characters were originally side characters in a short story I wrote called Welcome To The Nullscape, which is why these characters are set in the Nullscape universe.

Firebrand: A very hellbent and aggressive Diver class player, often called a 'hothead'

Illumina: A hushed but well-meaning Grappler class player, the most mature of the group.

Windforce: Very cocky but very adventurous Charger class player

There are 2 intros:

Intro 1 - Main intro

Intro 2 - Make your own scenario
creator: Cadence_The_DJ
